untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires visual identification of two peaks at equal price levels with a valley between them. This geometric pattern recognition cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and mathematical operators. Pattern detection requires multi-bar lookback logic and peak/valley identification which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The confirmation level (neckline) and measuring rule for target calculation are also pattern-structural elements that cannot be parameterized with the given operators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a candlestick/price-action pattern that requires shape recognition. Attempted basic short entry when price closes below pivot (proxy for neckline), but this does not capture the essential double-peak geometry. Author is silent on exact target computation and success rate details. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern-detection library.
